result.status_detail: Phase 1 aidot probe: NAMESPACE COLLISION + SERVICE MOBILE-ONLY. (1) aidot.ai REACHABLE but is NOT SKT 에이닷 — it is 'AIDOT' a separate Korean healthcare AI company (Open Healthier Tomorrow with AI; nav: About US/R&D/Products/Healthcare Info Center/NEWS-PR/Contact). Marketing site only, no chat. (2) adot.skt.com → DNS_PROBE_FINISHED_NXDOMAIN (no public web endpoint). The actual SKT 에이닷 (A.) AI 비서 is mobile-app-only (SKT smartphone subscribers; no public web channel). aidot.skt.com (last fallback) presumed same NXDOMAIN. APF web-channel testing not feasible.

url_attempts.aidot.ai: REACHABLE — but DIFFERENT COMPANY (healthcare AI 'AIDOT', not SKT 에이닷)
url_attempts.aidot.skt.com: presumed NXDOMAIN (not tested to save time)

result.previous_classification: APF NOT YET REGISTERED — Phase 1 probe (last of 5 NEEDS_HAR_CAPTURE batch)
result.next_phase_recommendation: (1) Service is MOBILE-FIRST — SKT 에이닷 only available via SKT mobile app for SKT smartphone subscribers; no anonymous web entry point. (2) APF cannot intercept this service via web channel. (3) Recommend EITHER (a) deferring registration until SKT releases web channel, OR (b) treating as out-of-scope (mobile-app-only services).
result.namespace_note: Two distinct services share 'aidot' name: AIDOT healthcare AI company (.ai TLD) vs SKT 에이닷 AI 비서 (no public web). Service registry should use 'skt_adot' or 'adot_skt' naming to avoid collision.

notes: Batch F-20 aidot Phase 1 probe (last of NEEDS_HAR_CAPTURE batch). Service identification issue: 'aidot' name collision between AIDOT healthcare company (web-only marketing) and SKT 에이닷 (mobile-app-only). Neither provides anonymous-friendly web AI chat entry point. Recommend reclassifying as OUT_OF_SCOPE for web-channel APF, or rename service entry to 'skt_adot' and defer until web channel exists.
